task: Create a re-engagement campaign for 5,000 subscribers who haven't opened in 90 days.
expect: Defines a segmentation strategy (e.g. 90-120 days vs 120-180 days inactive) with different approaches per segment
Includes a sequence of at least 3 emails with specific subject lines and content themes for each
Specifies a sunset policy for subscribers who don't re-engage after the campaign

task: Design a lifecycle email automation from signup through Year 1 for a B2B SaaS product.
expect: Defines lifecycle stages (onboarding, activation, adoption, retention, expansion) with clear transition criteria
Specifies trigger conditions for each email (time-based, behaviour-based, or milestone-based)
Includes content themes per stage and key metrics to track per email (open rate, click rate, conversion goal)

task: Our deliverability dropped from 95% to 78% this month. Diagnose and create a recovery plan.
expect: Checks email authentication setup (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) and domain/IP reputation
Evaluates list hygiene (bounce rates, spam complaints, inactive subscribers) and content issues (spam trigger words, image-to-text ratio)
Proposes a phased recovery plan addressing sending patterns, list segmentation, and ISP-specific reputation repair
